note: Line-ending-only normalization (CRLF -> LF) of vendored upstream shell scripts. NO algorithmic change. Proof: the CR-stripped content hash is IDENTICAL before and after; only the raw byte hash differs.
reason: CRLF in executable shell scripts corrupts exit codes under WSL bash; preflight.sh now fails any launch when a tracked *.sh contains CR.
